description: NinjaTrader 8 is running on the Windows desktop with daily OHLCV data for SPY, AAPL, and MSFT. As a technical analyst, compare AAPL and MSFT by creating two visible chart windows. Configure the AAPL chart with 50-period and 200-period Simple Moving Averages and a Volume sub-panel. Configure the MSFT chart with a 20-period Exponential Moving Average, Bollinger Bands (Period=20, StdDev=2), and a MACD (12, 26, 9) sub-panel. Save the workspace. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
